diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase, sets up default router to SmartRouter with fallback routers, and provides constructor for instantiating the Hono framework.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, router, strict.
+- Simple note: Core Hono class that inherits from HonoBase, uses SmartRouter by default composed of RegExpRouter and TrieRouter, has 34 lines total.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base module for Hono providing the Hono class implementation with routing, request handling, method definitions, middleware support, and core lifecycle methods.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, compose, Context, Router, METHODS, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, Next, Env, fetch, request, fire, route, basePath, mount, addRoute, errorHandler, notFoundHandler.
+- Simple note: Provides all main Hono functionality including get/post/put/delete/all/patch methods, request handling via #dispatch, middleware composition, error/not-found handlers, 545 lines total.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router module index that exports PatternRouter class.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Simple index file with 6 lines that re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router implementation using regular expressions converted from path patterns, compiles routes to RegEx on add, matches by exec.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, add, match, Route, emptyParams, RegExp, UnsupportedPathError, endsWithWildcard, METHOD_NAME_ALL.
+- Simple note: Compares paths by regex matching after conversion, allows wildcards, optional params, throws UnsupportedPathError for ambiguous patterns.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router module index that exports LinearRouter class.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Simple index file with 6 lines that re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear comparison router iteratively checks all routes in addition order, supports wildcards, named params, and optional params.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, add, match, ROUTES_LOOP, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, checkOptionalParameter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError.
+- Simple note: Uses linear scan comparing routePath === path, uses loops with labels for complex matching, handles label+star case, throws UnsupportedPathError for label+star combo.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router module index for RegExpRouter that re-exports the router class and PreparedRegExpRouter with helper functions.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Index file with 7 lines exporting main router class and prepared router serialization helpers.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExp-based router that uses Trie internally during add phase then builds regex matchers, supports middleware, handles wildcards with cache, implements prepare-to-build pattern.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, match, Trie, buildAllMatchers, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, findMiddleware, Middleware, HandlerWithMetadata, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher.
+- Simple note: Two-phase router: add routes to Trie, then on match call to build and cache regex-based matcher with handler arrays and static path map.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Matcher interface implementation that builds static path matching and dynamic regex matching, provides match function.
+- Names noticed: match, Matcher, HandlerData, ParamIndexMap, StaticMap, ParamStash, emptyParam.
+- Simple note: 33 lines, implements match method that checks staticMap first then falls back to regex matching, returns handlers with index mapping for param resolution.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Pre-built router that accepts precomputed matchers and relocate map, skips building phase for faster matching, used for serialization optimization.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, add, match, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, MatcherMap, RelocateMap, addWildcard, addPath.
+- Simple note: Factory pattern accepting prebuilt matchers, add method routes via relocateMap indices, supports wildcards, faster than RegExpRouter since no build step.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation with insert and buildRegExpStr methods for constructing trie structure and generating regex patterns from it.
+- Names noticed: Node, insert, buildRegExpStr, PATH_ERROR, compareKey, Context, varIndex, children, regExpMetaChars.
+- Simple note: 162 lines, recursive insert builds children structure with regex keys and varIndex for param tracking, buildRegExpStr combines children patterns, path error enforces ambiguity.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie for storing path patterns, preprocesses patterns by extracting label groups and converting to tokens, delegates to Node for insert.
+- Names noticed: Trie, insert, buildRegExp, Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, groups, tokens, ReplacementMap.
+- Simple note: 74 lines, preprocesses paths by replacing label groups, converts to regex with capture indices, returns [RegExp, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap].
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router module index that exports SmartRouter class.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Simple index file with 6 lines that re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Delegating router that sequentially tries multiple underlying routers, builds routes on first add, caches active router after match, throws error on no match.
+- names noticed: SmartRouter, add, match, activeRouter, ROUTER_LOOP, ROUTERS_LOOP, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, Router, routers, Routes.
+- Simple note: 70 lines, loops through router array adding routes to each, uses first successful match, stores active router, throws Error if none match.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+-
